command:
ssh -i /home/jose/.ssh/n8n_bridge -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=10 jose@192.168.0.202 bash -s << OUTEREOF
echo '--- 1. Write service file ---'
echo  | base64 -d | sudo tee /etc/systemd/system/hermes-gateway.service > /dev/null
echo 'service file written'

echo '--- 2. Patch config.yaml ---'
echo  | base64 -d > /tmp/pcfg.py && python3 /tmp/pcfg.py && rm -f /tmp/pcfg.py

echo '--- 3. Verify model ---'
grep -E 'default:|default_model:' /home/jose/.hermes/config.yaml | head -2

echo '--- 4. Clear sessions/state/logs ---'
printf '{}' > /home/jose/.hermes/sessions/sessions.json
printf '{}' > /home/jose/.hermes/gateway_state.json
rm -f /home/jose/.hermes/sessions/request_dump_*.json
> /home/jose/.hermes/logs/gateway.log
> /home/jose/.hermes/logs/agent.log  
> /home/jose/.hermes/logs/errors.log
echo cleared

echo '--- 5. Clear old webhook ---'
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8810426999:AAFVOYtkbR2NtFV9-OfvkjeogQo4-gK37W0/deleteWebhook?drop_pending_updates=true' | python3 -c "import sys,json; print('webhook cleared:', json.load(sys.stdin).get('ok'))"
sleep 3

echo '--- 6. Start Sakura ---'
sudo systemctl daemon-reload
sudo systemctl enable hermes-gateway 2>/dev/null
sudo systemctl start hermes-gateway
sleep 15
systemctl is-active hermes-gateway
ss -tlnp 2>/dev/null | grep 8080 | head -1

echo '--- 7. Webhook check ---'
sleep 5
curl -s 'https://api.telegram.org/bot8810426999:AAFVOYtkbR2NtFV9-OfvkjeogQo4-gK37W0/getWebhookInfo' | python3 -c "import sys,json; r=json.load(sys.stdin)['result']; print('url:', r.get('url'), '| pending:', r.get('pending_update_count'), '| error:', repr(r.get('last_error_message')))"
echo SAKURA_DONE
OUTEREOF
